topic: There is a parking level the elevator stops at but the stairs never reach.
title: The Parking Level The Stairs Never Reached | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There is a parking level the elevator stops at, but the stairs never reach.
scenes.image_prompt: A dim concrete parking garage level, rows of empty spaces, flickering tube lights, deep shadow at the far end, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I park in the same downtown garage every working day.
scenes.image_prompt: Entrance ramp of a multilevel parking garage at dusk, painted level numbers on concrete, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Six levels down, level two, same spot every time.
scenes.image_prompt: A single parked car in an otherwise empty garage level, harsh overhead light, oil-stained concrete, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One evening the elevator buttons listed a level between two and three.
scenes.image_prompt: Close still of parking garage elevator buttons, an extra unlabeled button glowing between the numbers, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The doors opened there. The numbers on the wall were wrong.
scenes.image_prompt: Garage elevator doors open onto a concrete level, painted wall number smeared and unreadable, cold light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Cars filled every space. None of them had license plates.
scenes.image_prompt: Rows of identical parked cars under flickering garage lights, blank where plates should be, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I took the stairs the next day, counting every landing down.
scenes.image_prompt: A bare concrete stairwell descending, painted level numbers on each landing, harsh single bulb, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The stairs skipped it. Two went straight to three. No door.
scenes.image_prompt: A stairwell landing where the wall is blank concrete with no door, painted numbers jumping, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Only the elevator knew it was there. So I rode down again.
scenes.image_prompt: Interior of a garage elevator descending, floor numbers ticking on the panel, cold reflected light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My own car sat there, engine warm, doors locked, with me inside.
scenes.image_prompt: A parked car under garage lights with a faint silhouette seated at the wheel, fogged windows, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I ran for the ramp. There was no ramp on that level.
scenes.image_prompt: A concrete garage level with solid walls on every side, no exit ramp, flickering tubes, long shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I park aboveground now. But my car always smells faintly of concrete.
scenes.image_prompt: A car parked outdoors at dawn in an open lot, faint mist, grey overcast light, empty surroundings, vertical 9:16 framing
